title: Unbounded visit_ids Vec in refind structural aggregate accumulator

findings.description: RefindAccumulatorEntry carries a visit_ids: Vec<i64> that grows without limit. For a popular page visited daily over 20 years the vector can hold hundreds of thousands of visit IDs. These are serialized into the evidence_json string via serde_json::json!({"visitIds": entry.visit_ids}). On a 14.4M archive with popular pages, this produces multi-megabyte JSON blobs per refind-page row and keeps millions of i64 values in memory across all accumulated refind pages simultaneously.
findings.suggestedFix: Cap visit_ids at a reasonable sample size (e.g., 50 most recent) and record totalVisitCount as a separate integer field. The evidence JSON only needs enough IDs for UI drill-down, not the full set.
